name: Brunch Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese, ham, green onions, and red bell pepper.
2. Soften the tortillas according to package directions. Divide the cheese mixture evenly among the tortillas. Roll up each tortilla tightly with the seam side down and place them seam-side down in a greased 11 x 7 inch baking dish.
3. In a medium bowl, beat together eggs, milk, salsa, and flour until well combined. Pour this mixture over the enchiladas in the baking dish, making sure all pieces are evenly coated.
4. Refrigerate the dish overnight.
5. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius). Cover the baking dish with foil.
6. Bake for 45 minutes, or until the enchiladas are set and cooked through.
7. Remove the cover and sprinkle any remaining cheese and sliced olives over the top, if desired.
8. Continue baking uncovered for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
